reasoning: At 1x the sprite is a dense teal+green circular blob — the dashed ring, body, and sparkle elements all compete and the overall read is 'glowing disc' rather than a distinct character or summon effect. At 4x the construction is legible: a round pink core with cream/white petal accents inside a segmented teal ring, orbited by scattered white cloud-puff particles. The pink core reads warm and friendly, and the soft round shapes (petals, puffs) carry toy-like charm. However the mid-teal background of the ring and the dark panel backgrounds are close in value, so the ring loses its pop on dark backgrounds — contrast is adequate but not confident. On the light panel the teal ring stands out well. Edge cleanliness is decent at 4x but the dashed-circle outer rim adds noise without adding silhouette clarity. Charm is present but mild; the design reads more 'magical seal' than 'cute character', and there is no expressive face or focal personality element. Sticker test: passes at 4x, borderline at 1x. Summary: charming palette and round shapes earn it, but the busy layered ring structure and weak 1x readability prevent a pass.
